case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. WYNNE DENG

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO DEFENDANT DENG, WYNNE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DENG, WYNNE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-15-2019
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT CCP 585(D) (TRANSACTION ID # 100095967) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DENG, WYNNE $1,155.66 PRINCIPAL, $240.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,396.16, SEE SCANNED DOC
